name: Aircraft Evolution
short_description: Take part in aerial battles with warplanes from different eras — from World War I to the future. Drop bombs, upgrade your aircraft, and turn enemy bases into rubble in the explosive action game Aircraft Evolution!
detailed_description:
Arcade air combat packed with explosions, upgrades, and the evolution of warplanes!

Aircraft Evolution is a fast-paced 2D arcade action game where you take flight across four eras of aerial warfare—from the wooden biplanes of World War I to futuristic jet fighters. Upgrade your aircraft, unlock devastating weapons, and obliterate enemy bases with a deadly arsenal of bombs!

Take on thrilling missions, battle tanks and enemy aircraft, defeat powerful bosses, and leave burning ruins in your wake.

Key Features:

  • Aircraft evolution: Fly and upgrade planes from WWI biplanes to futuristic war machines.

  • Four historical eras: World War I, World War II, modern warfare, and future battles.

  • 40 action-packed missions: With diverse objectives, including base destruction, dogfights, and boss battles.

  • Endless mode: Upgrade your plane and survive waves of increasingly powerful enemies.

  • Deep upgrade system: Improve armor, fuel, weapons, and overall aircraft performance.

  • Huge bomb variety: Use cluster bombs, napalm, energy bombs, and even nukes!

  • Destruction physics: Watch buildings crumble and explode in spectacular style.

  • Varied environments: Arctic, desert, jungle, and forest—each with its own visual flair.

Why play it:

  • Perfect for fans of arcade shooters and war-themed action games.

  • Easy to pick up, hard to put down—great for short sessions or long playthroughs.

  • Visually rich with stunning explosions and destruction effects.

  • Retro gameplay meets modern graphics and explosive fun.

Ideal for players who enjoy:

  • Airplane games

  • Military arcade games

  • Tech upgrade mechanics

  • Action games with destruction and explosions

  • Retro-inspired games with a modern twist

Ready for air combat?

Upgrade your wings, load up your bombs, and dominate the skies. In Aircraft Evolution, there are countless enemies—and even more explosions!

supported_languages: English, Russian, French, German, Portuguese - Brazil, Simplified Chinese, Korean, Japanese
